allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "==== src 真实结构 ===="; Get-ChildItem -Path ".\\src" -Recurse -Force -File | Select-Object @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path,''\)}}, Length; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "==== App.tsx 真实内容 ===="; Get-Content ".\\src\\App.tsx")

PowerShell(Get-Content "C:\\Users\\helid\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--05-Study-01CC-01-todolistline\\be421ffd-d2e1-4e5d-ae63-aa691ccc228a\\tasks\\b33xpoed3.output" -Tail 20; Write-Output "---- 端口检查 ----"; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5173 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\helid\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--05-Study-01CC-01-todolistline\\be421ffd-d2e1-4e5d-ae63-aa691ccc228a\\tasks\\b33xpoed3.output"; $lines = Get-Content $f; $idx = \($lines | Select-String -Pattern "error occurred|Uncaught|TypeError|Cannot read|is not|Error:" | Select-Object -First 1\).LineNumber; if \($idx\) { $start = [Math]::Max\(0, $idx-6\); $lines[$start..\($idx+2\)] } else { Write-Output "no explicit error line found; showing first 40 lines:"; $lines | Select-Object -First 40 })

PowerShell(Write-Output "==== src 真实文件\(大小+时间\)===="; Get-ChildItem -Path ".\\src" -Recurse -Force -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.tsx','.ts' } | Select-Object @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path,''\)}}, Length, @{n='Time';e={$_.LastWriteTime.ToString\('HH:mm:ss'\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\helid\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--05-Study-01CC-01-todolistline\\be421ffd-d2e1-4e5d-ae63-aa691ccc228a\\tasks\\bb9wp7t2n.output"; if \(Test-Path $f\) { $err = Get-Content $f | Select-String -Pattern "error|Invalid hook|TypeError|error#|Failed|Unhandled" | Select-Object -Last 10; if \($err\) { Write-Output "==== 日志有错误 ===="; $err } else { Write-Output "==== 日志干净 ====" } } else { Write-Output "日志文件不存在" }; Write-Output "---- 端口 5173 ----"; \(Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 5173 -WarningAction SilentlyContinue\).TcpTestSucceeded)

PowerShell(Write-Output "==== src 文件 ===="; Get-ChildItem -Path ".\\src" -Recurse -Force -File | Where-Object { $_.Extension -in '.tsx','.ts','.css' } | Select-Object @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName.Replace\(\(Get-Location\).Path,''\)}}, Length)

PowerShell(Write-Output "==== 1.磁盘:Canvas.tsx ===="; \(Get-Content ".\\src\\components\\Canvas.tsx" | Select-String -Pattern "edges|buildInitialEdges|useEdgesState"\).Line; Write-Output "==== 2.服务器是否存活 ===="; if \(Test-Path "C:\\Users\\helid\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--05-Study-01CC-01-todolistline\\be421ffd-d2e1-4e5d-ae63-aa691ccc228a\\tasks\\bb9wp7t2n.output"\) { $log = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\helid\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--05-Study-01CC-01-todolistline\\be421ffd-d2e1-4e5d-ae63-aa691ccc228a\\tasks\\bb9wp7t2n.output" -Tail 30; $log | Select-String -Pattern "error|Error|warn|ready|HMR"; Write-Output "Lines: $\($log.Count\)" } else { Write-Output "LOG FILE MISSING" })

PowerShell($f = "C:\\Users\\helid\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\claude\\D--05-Study-01CC-01-todolistline\\be421ffd-d2e1-4e5d-ae63-aa691ccc228a\\tasks\\bf6l9rq8l.output"; $log = Get-Content $f; $last = $log | Select-Object -Last 3; Write-Output "--- 最后 3 行 ---"; $last; $after = $log | Select-String -Pattern "Failed to reload|Unhandled" | Where-Object { $_.Line -match "12:09:4|12:1" }; if \($after\) { Write-Output "47之后仍有错"; $after } else { Write-Output "47之后无错误" })
